$schema_note: Etsy SKU registry. One entry per listing. Blob path is the versioned Azure path; bump version + path together when rotating after a leak. The 'secret' field is intentionally null in v1 of this design — the redemption endpoint reads it and skips token verification when null. When you later want per-SKU rotation without leaving an asset open, set secret to a long random string and pass ?t=<secret> in the Etsy PDF URL. Code paths handle both modes from day one.

packs.title: MBTI Character Pack: Marvel, Ghibli & Friends (100 Personality Cards)
packs.description: 100 printable 3:4 character portraits assigned by MBTI personality type. Covers 66 Marvel heroes, 23 Studio Ghibli characters, and 11 from Friends. Use for personality quizzes, classroom decor, or fan-art reference.

packs.title: Kids English-Chinese Bilingual Vocabulary Cards (108 Flashcards)
packs.description: 108 printable bilingual vocabulary flashcards for early-childhood English-Chinese learning. Covers 12 themed topics — animals, food, nature, family, transportation, weather, body, emotions, celebrations, school, space, and life cycles. Each card has 8 vocab items with pinyin pronunciation.

packs.title: Phonics Pack: 50 Blend, Digraph & Vowel Pattern Posters
packs.description: 50 printable phonics posters for early-childhood English learning. Covers consonant blends (bl, br, cl, cr, dr, fl, fr, gl, gr, pl, pr, sc, sk, sl, sm, sn, sp, st, sw, tr, tw), consonant digraphs (ch, ck, ng, ph, sh, th, wh), vowel digraphs (ai, ay, ea, ee, ei, ey, ie, oa, oe, oi, oo, ou, ow, ue, ui), r-controlled vowels (ar, er, ir, or, ur), and trigraphs (scr, str). Each poster shows 6-8 example words with cartoon illustrations on a bright kid-friendly background. Use for classroom decor, homeschool curriculum, ESL phonics drills, or reading-readiness practice.

packs.title: World Cup 2026 National Team Squad Posters (48 Countries)
packs.description: 48 printable celebrity-poster-style squad posters — one per nation in the FIFA World Cup 2026 finals. Each poster features the team's star players in cinematic movie-poster composition: dramatic lighting, soft gradient backgrounds, character portraits with luxury minimalist typography. Covers all 12 groups: hosts Mexico/USA/Canada, marquee contenders Brazil/Argentina/France/Germany/Spain/England/Portugal, plus all 37 other qualifying nations from South Korea to Cabo Verde, Uruguay to New Zealand. Use for sports-bar decor, fan-art walls, classroom geography units, World Cup viewing parties, or as printable wallpapers for the tournament window.
